title: Burdening citizens
content:
India is said to be world's largest demo crazy, yet people are given nothing in return. over the span of last 30-40 years we have moved on from socialist form of development to pure capitalist or crony form of govt. A transition initiated by the then prime minister Rajiv. fast forward to 2020's we see that human life in India is treated as disposable like the pre independent era. its funny that we boost about democracy and peoples rights and yet zero fucks are given about marginalized peoples lives. 2 days ago some 100 people died in a cyclone and I didn't see any nation wide coverage about the death and financial losses. Such is the state of India or Bharat as ultra pro nationalists call it.

crisis management is a joke in India. For a decade all the private companies harvested the benefit of low priced crude oils and just as when the crude prices started to rise citizens are burdened with more price hikes. it is always a one way traffic.

sadly citizens are fed with fake news and narratives almost all of the population believes that India is a super power and in the past 10 years we have grown exponentially. What values goes GDP growth bring to the larger mass when only 1 percent of the citizens enjoy all the benefits and 90 percent of the citizens live in poverty or artificial poverty created by the greedy system that didn't even change a bit from old British raj characteristics.
